svg.title: MIR optimization pass pipeline (schematic)
svg.desc: Borrow-checked MIR runs through an ordered sequence of MirPasses; Inline runs first, then SimplifyCfg cleanup, then GVN, then DataflowConstProp, then a final SimplifyCfg, then DeadStoreElim and DestinationPropagation; each pass exposes work for the next.
